Title: An Efficient NB-LDPC Decoder Architecture for Space Telecommand Links
Authors: Ángel Álvarez, Víctor Fernández, Balázs Matuz
Abstract: In the framework of error correction in space telecommand (TC) links, the Consultative Committee for Space Data Systems (CCSDS) currently recommends short block-length BCH and binary low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes. Authors: Massimo Battaglioni, Franco Chiaraluce, Marco Baldi, Michael Lentmaier

Authors: Min Qiu, Xiaowei Wu, Alexandre Graell i Amat, Jinhong Yuan

Authors: Che-Hao Yu, Lin Huang, Cheng-Shang Chang, Duan-Shin Lee

Title: Concentrated Stopping Set Design for Coded Merkle Tree: Improving Security Against Data Availability Attacks in Blockchain Systems
